title: Running on Empty
author: Jonice Webb
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A fuel gauge: the needle is on E (empty), at the bottom of the arc. The single red arc traces from E back to 1/4 — the danger zone. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1100)" fill="none">
    <!-- Outer ring: 3/4 of a circle from 0° (right) sweeping clockwise to 270° (left, E) -->
    <path d="M -380 0 A 380 380 0 1 1 380 0" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- Red danger arc — last quarter of the gauge, from 12 o'clock to E (left) -->
    <path d="M 0 -380 A 380 380 0 0 0 -380 0" stroke="#fc1c46" stroke-width="6"/>
    <!-- Tick marks at 0, 1/4, 1/2, 3/4, E -->
    <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1.5">
      <line x1="380" y1="0" x2="340" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="269" y1="-269" x2="240" y2="-240"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="-380" x2="0" y2="-340"/>
      <line x1="-269" y1="-269" x2="-240" y2="-240"/>
    </g>
    <g fill="#4c4c4c" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.04em" text-anchor="middle">
      <text x="400" y="6">F</text>
      <text x="285" y="-285">3/4</text>
      <text x="0" y="-400">1/2</text>
      <text x="-285" y="-285">1/4</text>
    </g>
    <text x="-400" y="6" text-anchor="end" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="22" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.04em" fill="#fc1c46">E</text>
    <!-- The needle pointing to E (empty) -->
    <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="-320" y2="190" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="20" fill="#0a0a0a" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="6" fill="#fc1c46"/>
    <!-- Center label -->
    <text x="0" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" letter-spacing="0.18em" fill="#4c4c4c">FUEL · EMOTIONAL</text>
  </g>
</svg>
rationale: A fuel gauge with the needle on E (empty). The last quarter of the gauge — the danger zone — is red. The center label reads 'FUEL · EMOTIONAL,' making the metaphor explicit: childhood emotional neglect drains the tank. 360px mixed-case title sits at the bottom. The single red is the danger arc.
